content.description:
Workhorse Site Solutions is a family-owned and locally-operated business serving the Portland Metro Area as a comprehensive partner for hauling, removal, and site preparation. Originally known as Workhorse Hauling & Junk Removal, the company has evolved to meet the full spectrum of needs for residential, commercial, and construction clients. Today, we offer far more than junk removal—we provide excavation, grading, site prep, construction demolition, and land clearing services that position us as a complete solution for property transformation projects.

From residential cleanouts and appliance removal to commercial debris cleanup, foreclosure services, and specialized equipment hauling, Workhorse Site Solutions handles projects of all scopes. Our versatile fleet and experienced team excel at managing everything from furniture and e-waste to construction materials, machinery, and bulk landscape material delivery. We understand that every project is unique, and we bring the right equipment and professional approach to ensure each job is completed safely, efficiently, and with responsibility.

Licensed, bonded, and insured, Workhorse Site Solutions is built on a commitment to exceptional customer service and treating our clients like family. We go above and beyond to deliver top-notch results, clearing the way for what's next in your project or property improvement.

tagline: Groundwork, Grading & Property Solutions for Residential and Commercial Projects
